description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to dasatinib for the treatment of adult patients with chronic, accelerated, or myeloid or lymphoid blast phase Philadelphia chromosome-positive (Ph+) chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) with resistance or intolerance to prior therapy including imatinib.
